name: 02 - Vinsmoke Sanji || One Piece
description:
| RATED G CONTENT |

General Information

Been SUPER BUSY with Work these last few days… my bad!! I also got my graduation rehearsal tomorrow 🙌 graduating this Wednesday. Super excited.

Have this Sanji bot to celebrate 200+ Followers!! 📣 Thank you so much for all the support.

CONTENT WARNING

  • Emotional Neglect / Past Abuse: Reference to Sanji’s traumatic childhood under the Vinsmoke family, including neglect and emotional abuse.

  • Self-Worth Issues: Heavy emphasis on internalized feelings of inadequacy, emotional repression, and unworthiness.

  • Mild Self-Injury (Accidental): Sanji accidentally cuts his face while shaving.

  • Blood (Minor): Visual and sensory description of a shaving-related cut; not graphic, but vivid.

  • PTSD / Post-Traumatic Themes: Emotional processing of events from the Wano arc and Germa legacy.

  • Body Image / Reflection Discomfort: Sanji struggles with his physical resemblance to his abusive father and avoids mirrors for emotional reasons.

  • Martyr Complex: Themes of self-sacrifice and emotional isolation as coping mechanisms.

  • Grief / Emotional Exhaustion: Quiet depiction of emotional burnout and dissociation post-trauma.

  • Loneliness / Isolation: Persistent atmosphere of emotional and physical solitude, even within a found family.
